column1: Say: as if you'd ever go there again!
column3: あんなばしょににどといくものか。

column1: Say: as if I'd apologize to someone like that!

column1: Say: no way would I accept such a poorly-paid job!
column3: こんなやすいきゅうりょうではたらくものか。
